subject: Rodriguez Quinceañera — photo package confirmation
snippet: Carmen, confirming we're on for Oct 17. Ceremony starts at 5 PM sharp...
body:
Carmen,

Confirming we're on for Oct 17. Ceremony starts at 5 PM sharp at Emerald Hall, 4500 W Flamingo Rd. Client wants the traditional waltz shots plus table candids during dinner. They're expecting the full 8-hour package.

Walkthroughs Oct 3 at 10 AM if you want to come — your call.

Let me know your invoice amount so I can build it into the final client bill.

Chris

subject: Re: Rodriguez Quinceañera — photo package confirmation
snippet: Confirmed. I'll skip the walkthrough but I'll be there by 4:30 on the 17th...
body:
Confirmed. I'll skip the walkthrough but I'll be there by 4:30 on the 17th to set up. Invoice is $950 for 8 hours. I'll email it over Monday.

Carmen

subject: Mariana's quince — final headcount
snippet: Chris, we're at 147 confirmed guests now. Think we need to talk about the table layout again...
body:
Chris,

We're at 147 confirmed guests now. That's 12 more than last month. Think we need to revisit the table layout with Emerald Hall. Also the DJ needs an updated count for the sound system.

Can we do a call this week?

Lupe

subject: Re: Mariana's quince — final headcount
snippet: 147 is fine for that room. Max is 175 seated. I'll call Emerald Hall Monday...
body:
147 is fine for that room. Max is 175 seated, so we're good. I'll call Emerald Hall Monday to adjust the floor plan — they'll add two rounds of 8.

I'll text the DJ separately. No need for a full call on this.

Chris

subject: Fuentes quince — choreography schedule
snippet: Mary, Camila Fuentes is set for Nov 14 at Las Palmas. She wants 6 chambelanes...
body:
Mary,

Camila Fuentes is set for Nov 14 at Las Palmas Banquet Hall, 8380 W Sahara. She wants 6 chambelanes and is asking about a surprise father-daughter waltz at the end. Her mom says Camila has zero dance experience, so factor that in.

Can you fit them into your schedule for rehearsals in October? At least 3 sessions.

Chris

subject: Re: Fuentes quince — choreography schedule
snippet: I can do 3 Saturdays in October. Tell Camila zero experience is fine...
body:
I can do 3 Saturdays in October — Oct 4, 11, and 25. Tell Camila zero experience is fine, we've worked with worse. The father-daughter waltz is easy to add in the third session.

Send me the family's contact info and I'll reach out to schedule.

Mary

subject: Nov schedule — housekeeping floors 12-18
snippet: Chris, posting November schedule next week. Let me know if you have any conflicts...
body:
Chris,

Posting November schedule next week. Thanksgiving week we're splitting shifts differently this year — GM decision. You're tentatively on AM shift Nov 24-26 so you'd be done by 3 PM Thanksgiving.

Let me know if that's a problem.

Gerald

subject: Re: Nov schedule — housekeeping floors 12-18
snippet: AM shift works. I need Nov 14 off — have a client event...
body:
AM shift works. I need Nov 14 off — private event I'm running. Already have it on the request log from last month. Just flagging again so it doesn't get lost in the shuffle.

Chris

subject: Supply order — floors 15-16 cart restock
snippet: Gerald, cart 3 on 15 is down to 4 rolls of paper towel and the mop head is shot...
body:
Gerald,

Cart 3 on floor 15 is down to 4 rolls of paper towel and the mop head needs replacing. Floor 16 is also low on glass cleaner — maybe 2 bottles left. Submitted the paper form but wanted to flag it here too since the last order took 10 days.

Chris

subject: Thanksgiving grocery list
snippet: Dad, here's what I'm making. Can you grab the stuff for tamales since you know which masa Mom used...
body:
Dad,

Here's what I'm making. Can you grab the stuff for tamales since you know which masa Rosa used?

Needs:
- 5 lb masa harina (Maseca)
- 2 lbs pork shoulder
- Dried ancho and guajillo chiles (big bag)
- Corn husks

I'll handle everything else. Miguel can help wrap. Tell him it's mandatory.

Sofia

subject: Re: Thanksgiving grocery list
snippet: Got it. He knows it's mandatory whether he likes it or not...
body:
Got it. Cardenas on Flamingo usually has the good dried chiles. I'll go Saturday.

Told Miguel. He said cool, which is teenager for I'll be there.

Chris

subject: Mom's follow-up appointment
snippet: Hey — Rosa's knee follow-up is Dec 9. She's being stubborn about the PT...
body:
Hey,

Rosa's knee follow-up is Dec 9. She's being stubborn about the PT exercises. Says they hurt. The doctor said that's normal but she's only doing them twice a day instead of three times.

Any chance you can call her this week? She listens to you more than me. Not complaining, just stating a fact.

Carlos

subject: Re: Mom's follow-up appointment
snippet: I'll call her Sunday. Send me the PT sheet so I can go through it with her...
body:
I'll call her Sunday. Send me the PT sheet so I can go through it with her on video. She responds better to a visual.

And yes — I know she listens to me more. I've been hearing that my whole life.

Chris

subject: Annual physical — appointment reminder
snippet: This is a reminder that your annual physical is scheduled for January 8 at 10:00 AM...
body:
This is a reminder that your annual physical is scheduled for January 8, 2026, at 10:00 AM with Dr. Patricia Reeves at Desert Springs Clinic.

Please fast for 10 hours before the appointment. Bring your insurance card and arrive 15 minutes early to complete updated intake forms.

To reschedule call 702-256-0284.

Desert Springs Clinic Patient Services

subject: Re: Annual physical — appointment reminder
snippet: Confirmed. One question — can we also go over my blood pressure results from November...
body:
Confirmed, I'll be there.

One question — can we also go over the blood pressure results from my November check-in? The reading was 138/88 and I want to know if that's something we're tracking or acting on.

Chris Murray

subject: Heads up — 14th floor inspection Tuesday
snippet: Gerald told me this morning. Unannounced corporate walk-through Tuesday AM...
body:
Gerald told me this morning. Unannounced corporate walk-through Tuesday AM. I'd get your carts in order tonight if I were you. Last time they checked the grout in 1412.

You're welcome.

Yo

subject: Rodriguez event — final vendor list and contact sheet
snippet: Lupe, attaching the final vendor sheet. DJ is Marcus Webb...
body:
Lupe,

Here's the final vendor sheet for Mariana's quince:

- Photographer: Carmen Davidson, (702) 256-0256
- Choreographer: Mary Jensen, (702) 256-0263
- DJ: Marcus Webb, Pulse Entertainment, (702) 256-0310
- Florals: Desert Bloom, (702) 256-0325 — 12 centerpieces, arch for the waltz
- Caterer: Las Vegas Fiesta Catering, (702) 256-0340 — buffet for 147

Everyone's confirmed. Full payment schedule in the attached sheet. Final balance is due Oct 10.

Chris
Momentos by Chris
https://www.momentosbychris.com

subject: Isabella recital — schedule reminder
snippet: Bella's winter dance recital is Dec 11 at 6:30 PM at Crestview High...
body:
Sofia,

Bella's winter dance recital is Dec 11 at 6:30 PM at Crestview High School. I'm picking her up from school that day — you come straight after your shift. Get there by 6:15 to get decent seats.

Carlos and Rosa are calling in on video. I'll set that up.

Dad

subject: Schedule request — June 20 shift swap
snippet: Gerald, need to swap my June 20 PM shift. Have a vendor meeting for a November event...
body:
Gerald,

Need to swap my June 20 PM shift. I have a vendor meeting for a November event at 3 PM and it runs 2 hours minimum. Yolanda said she can cover if you approve the swap.

Let me know.

Chris

subject: Re: Schedule request — June 20 shift swap
snippet: Approved. Make sure Yolanda signs the swap form before the 18th...
body:
Approved. Make sure Yolanda signs the swap form with HR before the 18th or it won't process in time.

Gerald

subject: Rodriguez Quinceañera — package proposal and pricing
snippet: Hi, attaching the Momentos by Chris proposal for the Rodriguez celebration at Em...
body: Hi, attaching the Momentos by Chris proposal for the Rodriguez celebration at Emerald Hall. The full-service package covers venue coordination, decor, vendor management, timeline, and day-of coordination. Deposit holds the date. Let me know which package fits and I'll send the contract.

subject: Rodriguez Quinceañera — timeline draft for review
snippet: Attached is the working timeline for the Rodriguez event at Emerald Hall: setup,...
body: Attached is the working timeline for the Rodriguez event at Emerald Hall: setup, court entrance, waltz, dinner service, and cake. Please confirm the ceremony start time so I can lock vendor arrival windows. Any changes, send them my way.

subject: Re: Rodriguez Quinceañera — decor colors and centerpieces
snippet: Thanks for the color palette. For Emerald Hall I'd suggest the taller centerpiec...
body: Thanks for the color palette. For Emerald Hall I'd suggest the taller centerpiece vases with the LED bases so the head table reads well from the back of the room. I'll price out the balloon arch in those tones and follow up.

snippet: Hi Bloom & Petal, requesting a quote for the Rodriguez celebration: 12 table cen...
body: Hi Bloom & Petal, requesting a quote for the Rodriguez celebration: 12 table centerpieces, 2 entrance arrangements, and the head-table garland. Blush and champagne tones. Need it delivered and set the morning of the event. What's your lead time?

subject: Shift coverage request — Floors 12–18
snippet: Gerald, requesting coverage for Thursday. Two of the new hires are still in trai...
body: Gerald, requesting coverage for Thursday. Two of the new hires are still in training on VIP turndown, so I'd like Yolanda on 15 and 16 while I run the inspection prep. Let me know if that works with the board.

subject: Q4 corporate inspection prep — housekeeping checklist
snippet: Attached is the updated VIP room standards checklist for the Q4 inspection. I wa...
body: Attached is the updated VIP room standards checklist for the Q4 inspection. I walked floors 12 through 18 this morning; linens and amenity counts are set. Flagging the two carts that need replacement wheels before the walkthrough.

subject: VIP shift differential — business case
snippet: Gerald, following up on the shift differential for VIP floor coverage. The turnd...
body: Gerald, following up on the shift differential for VIP floor coverage. The turndown and amenity standards on 17 and 18 take measurably longer per room. I put the numbers in the attached one-pager. Can we get 15 minutes before the next staff meeting?

subject: New-hire training schedule — housekeeping
snippet: Here's the training rotation for the three new hires: linens and bed standards w...
body: Here's the training rotation for the three new hires: linens and bed standards week one, bathroom and amenity standards week two, VIP turndown week three. Yolanda is shadowing on VIP. I'll sign off once they clear the checklist.

subject: Supply order — carts, linens, amenities
snippet: Submitting the monthly supply order: replacement cart wheels, 40 sets of king li...
body: Submitting the monthly supply order: replacement cart wheels, 40 sets of king linens, amenity refills for the VIP floors, and two vacuum belts. The current stock runs out before the inspection. Approving today keeps us covered.

subject: Isabella — winter dance recital details
snippet: Confirming Isabella's winter dance recital is December 11 at Crestview High Scho...
body: Confirming Isabella's winter dance recital is December 11 at Crestview High School. She needs the costume fee in by the 1st. I'll be there right after my shift. Please send the call time and where parents should sit.

subject: Miguel — automotive program application
snippet: Following up on Miguel's application to the automotive technology program at Sou...
body: Following up on Miguel's application to the automotive technology program at Southern Nevada Technical College. Attaching his transcript and the recommendation form. Let me know if anything else is needed before the deadline.

subject: Sofia — nursing clinical schedule
snippet: Sofia, send me your clinical rotation dates so I can plan events around them. If...
body: Sofia, send me your clinical rotation dates so I can plan events around them. If you're on nights that week I'll get Yolanda to help with the Fuentes setup instead. Proud of you, mija.

subject: Carlos — Mom's care and Sunday call
snippet: Carlos, checking in on Mom before Sunday. Her refill should be ready at the phar...
body: Carlos, checking in on Mom before Sunday. Her refill should be ready at the pharmacy. I sent the monthly support this morning. Let's line up the Florida visit for the holidays and split the driving.

subject: Christmas cookie orders — now open
snippet: Christmas cookie orders are open. Sugar, chocolate chip, and the decorated gift ...
body: Christmas cookie orders are open. Sugar, chocolate chip, and the decorated gift boxes. Order by December 15 for guaranteed delivery. Reply with your box count and any allergies. Boxes are $28, dozen assorted is $18.

subject: Cookie order — Alvarez family gift boxes
snippet: Hi Chris, we'd like 2 decorated gift boxes for the Alvarez family this year, plu...
body: Hi Chris, we'd like 2 decorated gift boxes for the Alvarez family this year, plus a dozen assorted sugar cookies. Same as last December. Let me know the total and I'll send payment through QuickPay.

subject: Rodriguez Quinceañera — package proposal and pricing (follow-up 1)
snippet: Hi, attaching the Momentos by Chris proposal for the Rodriguez celebration at Em...

subject: Shift coverage request — Floors 12–18 (follow-up 1)
snippet: Gerald, requesting coverage for Thursday. Two of the new hires are still in trai...
body: Gerald, requesting coverage for Thursday. Two of the new hires are still in training on VIP turndown, so I'd like Yolanda on 15 and 16 while I run the inspection prep. Let me know if that works with the board.

subject: Q4 corporate inspection prep — housekeeping checklist (follow-up 1)
snippet: Attached is the updated VIP room standards checklist for the Q4 inspection. I wa...
body: Attached is the updated VIP room standards checklist for the Q4 inspection. I walked floors 12 through 18 this morning; linens and amenity counts are set. Flagging the two carts that need replacement wheels before the walkthrough.

subject: VIP shift differential — business case (follow-up 1)
snippet: Gerald, following up on the shift differential for VIP floor coverage. The turnd...
body: Gerald, following up on the shift differential for VIP floor coverage. The turndown and amenity standards on 17 and 18 take measurably longer per room. I put the numbers in the attached one-pager. Can we get 15 minutes before the next staff meeting?

subject: New-hire training schedule — housekeeping (follow-up 1)
snippet: Here's the training rotation for the three new hires: linens and bed standards w...
body: Here's the training rotation for the three new hires: linens and bed standards week one, bathroom and amenity standards week two, VIP turndown week three. Yolanda is shadowing on VIP. I'll sign off once they clear the checklist.

subject: Supply order — carts, linens, amenities (follow-up 1)
snippet: Submitting the monthly supply order: replacement cart wheels, 40 sets of king li...
body: Submitting the monthly supply order: replacement cart wheels, 40 sets of king linens, amenity refills for the VIP floors, and two vacuum belts. The current stock runs out before the inspection. Approving today keeps us covered.

subject: Isabella — winter dance recital details (follow-up 1)
snippet: Confirming Isabella's winter dance recital is December 11 at Crestview High Scho...
body: Confirming Isabella's winter dance recital is December 11 at Crestview High School. She needs the costume fee in by the 1st. I'll be there right after my shift. Please send the call time and where parents should sit.

subject: Miguel — automotive program application (follow-up 1)
snippet: Following up on Miguel's application to the automotive technology program at Sou...
body: Following up on Miguel's application to the automotive technology program at Southern Nevada Technical College. Attaching his transcript and the recommendation form. Let me know if anything else is needed before the deadline.

subject: Sofia — nursing clinical schedule (follow-up 1)
snippet: Sofia, send me your clinical rotation dates so I can plan events around them. If...
body: Sofia, send me your clinical rotation dates so I can plan events around them. If you're on nights that week I'll get Yolanda to help with the Fuentes setup instead. Proud of you, mija.

subject: Carlos — Mom's care and Sunday call (follow-up 1)
snippet: Carlos, checking in on Mom before Sunday. Her refill should be ready at the phar...
body: Carlos, checking in on Mom before Sunday. Her refill should be ready at the pharmacy. I sent the monthly support this morning. Let's line up the Florida visit for the holidays and split the driving.

subject: Christmas cookie orders — now open (follow-up 1)
snippet: Christmas cookie orders are open. Sugar, chocolate chip, and the decorated gift ...
body: Christmas cookie orders are open. Sugar, chocolate chip, and the decorated gift boxes. Order by December 15 for guaranteed delivery. Reply with your box count and any allergies. Boxes are $28, dozen assorted is $18.

body: Hi Chris, we'd like 2 decorated gift boxes for the Alvarez family this year, plus a dozen assorted sugar cookies. Same as last December. Let me know the total and I'll send payment through QuickPay.
